case_title: BARBARA SUZANNE FARLEY VS. MARTHA LYDDON

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER FARLEY, BARBARA SUZANNE WISCH, CHARLES J. HEARING SET FOR JUL-30-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER FARLEY, BARBARA SUZANNE WISCH, CHARLES J.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS BARBARA FARLEY AND CHARLES WISCH'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 7, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 30, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. MR. WISCH TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE OPPOSING PARTY. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 =302/EG

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PETITIONERS BARBARA FARLEY, and CHARLES WISCH's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is taken off-calendar by the moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Continued To Aug-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS BARBARA FARLEY and CHARLES WISCH'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to August 14, 2014 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Continued To Aug-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLES J. WISCH, TEL. NO. 788-1945 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS BARBARA FARLEY and CHARLES WISCH'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to August 7, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 30, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Mr. Wisch to give notice to the opposing party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/EG
